events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: insufficient anchor bolt projection on baseplates & anchor bolts, rough-complete stage, reference API RP 686. API RP 686 (API Recommended Practice 686) covers machinery installation. It requires anchor bolts to have proper projection for nuts and washers. Insufficient projection means non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk medium/high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.
